prompt_text:
### Demographics: 53-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~18.8 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 54.1 kg; Height 169.2 cm; BMI 18.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 137/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.0%; 9 months ago 6.9%; 6 months ago 7.4%; 3 months ago 7.6%; current 8.0%), FPG (12 months ago 183mg/dL; 9 months ago 180mg/dL; 6 months ago 188mg/dL; 3 months ago 171mg/dL; current 186mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 54.2kg; 9 months ago 54.9kg; 6 months ago 52.7kg; 3 months ago 54.3kg; current 54.1kg), Height (12 months ago 169.2cm; 9 months ago 169.2cm; 6 months ago 169.2cm; 3 months ago 169.2cm; current 169.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 18.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 137mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 137mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 67U/L; 9 months ago 75U/L; 6 months ago 68U/L; 3 months ago 69U/L; current 73U/L), AST (12 months ago 55U/L; 9 months ago 51U/L; 6 months ago 48U/L; 3 months ago 57U/L; current 54U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; current 53mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 165mg/g; 9 months ago 243mg/g; 6 months ago 183mg/g; 3 months ago 252mg/g; current 242mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 78mg/dL; 6 months ago 78mg/dL; 3 months ago 73mg/dL; current 76mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 45mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 134mg/dL; 9 months ago 140mg/dL; 6 months ago 151mg/dL; 3 months ago 138mg/dL; current 145mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 12.9g/dL; current 12.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.35 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
